Petition For Authority To Hold Sale Proceeds Pf M.M. Timoteo In Segregated Trust Account Pending Resolution Of Disputed Claims For Fraud And Misappropriation Of Funds Committed Against R.L. Timoteo Testamentry Trust.
Off Calendar Apr-28-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Lillian Ng for Ligaya Mallary, Trustee.

Ms. Ng stated that she had spoke with Mr. Wise and there were no objections, and the funds has been placed in a interest bearing account. The Court granted the Petition, Order signed in open court.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

Petition For Authority To Hold Sale Proceeds Pf M.M. Timoteo In Segregated Trust Account Pending Resolution Of Disputed Claims For Fraud And Misappropriation Of Funds Committed Against R.L. Timoteo Testamentry Trust.
Off Calendar Apr-07-2008 Continued To Apr-28-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Lillian Ng for Ligaya Mallary (Trustee).

Ms. Ng stated that she received a copy of a declaration of Kathleen Card and presented to the court for review, she stated that she is not certain that Mr. Timoteo is represented by Ms. Card or not.
The Court stated that the status of Mr. Timoteo being represented or not is still in question, and the filed declaration of Richard Wise indicated that he was no longer representing Mr. Timoteo. Ms. Ng further stated that the petition for an order authorizing establishment of segregated trust account for sale proceeds of Mr. Timoteo, to be transferred from the escrow company to the trust account to prevent further loss of funds. The Court continued the matter to April 28, 2008 for Ms. Ng to file memo. of points and authorities to hold the escrow funds and transferred to attorney's trust account. Notice to be given to Mr. Timoteo, Mr. Wise and Ms. Card.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Bailiff: R. Hill; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/C. Herbert.
